## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **Chrome version:** (e.g. 122.0.6261.94)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11)
- **Extension version:** (visible in chrome://extensions)
- **Document format:** JSON / YAML / XML

## Sample document
If relevant, paste a minimal example that reproduces the issue (anonymize sensitive data).


## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or console errors.
